person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/brittcope.htm#EudesIdied1062B

BARDULF .  “Comes Alanus Rufus” donated property to Swavesey Abbey, Cambridgeshire, for the soul of “patris sui Eudonis comitis”, by undated charter witnessed by “…Ribaldus et Bardulfus fratres comitis…”[377].  In Yorkshire.  m ---.  The name of Bardulf’s wife is not known.  Bardulf & his wife had [two] children: 

a)         ACARIAS (-after [1130]).  A manuscript history of Joreval Abbey records that “Akarius filius Bardolfi” founded the abbey[378].  “Alanus comes Britanniæ et Angliæ” confirmed the foundation of Joreval Abbey by “Akarius filius Bardolfii” and donated property to the abbey[379].  According to Domesday Descendants, he was ancestor of the FITZHUGH family of Ravensworth[380]. 

http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/brittcope.htm#EudesIdied1062B

zh.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth是Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne和Mother Unknown I的兒子，於大約1060年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓斯艾福。他至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1120年在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾拉文斯沃斯。

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth was born about 1060, in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Brittany, France as the son of Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne and Mother Unknown I. He had at least 2 sons. He died about 1120, in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth est né environ 1060, à Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, fils d’Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne et Mother Unknown I. Il a eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé environ 1120, à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Ravensworth, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth wurde um 1060 in Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich, als Sohn von Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne und Mother Unknown I geboren. Er hatte mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1120 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ravensworth, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth è nato il circa 1060 nel Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia come figlio di Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne e Mother Unknown I. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli. Morì circa 1120, nel Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハンペンスイevア
ja.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworthは約1060年にフランスブレタグンモービハンペンスイevアでEudes de Penthievre de BretagneとMother Unknown Iの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1120年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスで62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアラベンスウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth(은)는 대략 1060년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 펜스이e브르에서 Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne(와)과 Mother Unknown I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1120년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 레이븐스워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth nasceu aproximadamente 1060, em Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, França filho de Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne e Mother Unknown I. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1120, em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth родился около 1060 г. в местности пентиeвр, морбихань, бретагн, Франция. Его родителей звали Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne и Mother Unknown I. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер около 1120 г. в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности равенсворт, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Bardolf de Bretagne , Lord of Ravensworth nació aproximadamente 1060, en Penthièvre, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia como hijo de Eudes de Penthievre de Bretagne y Mother Unknown I. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1120, en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Ravensworth, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
